description:
A  quick little animation/animatic of the Hatter singing The Masochism Tango, dedicated to his ex gf the Queen of Hearts. 

HABROMANIA is the Alice in Wonderland Indie game I'm currently working on (the demo is in development as we speak). The game is an Undertale/Fran bow/ telltale type of game that follows a 19-year-old Alice as she wakes up in Wonderland and tries to get back to the surface with her sanity intact (and with little to no help from the overly friendly, eccentric inhabitants she encounters). 

You can check out my Instagram for more HABROMANIA content and development updates. @symphony_sonata

Song: The Masochism Tango by Tom Lehrer
Animated with Krita and A huion tablet
